songs.title: Glory be to God in the Highest - Amen. For His mercies endureth forever - Amen
Ta lo da biire, laiye at'orun, ko si o, ko si o
The Son of God is lifted up
songs.lyrics:
C: The Son of God is lifted up,
R: The Son of God is lifted up
Jeeeesus, wonderful and glorious
Saaaaviour, The Son of God

songs.title: J E S U S *2, oruko yen o lagbara
songs.lyrics: Jesu ti Nazareti *2, o ti ran mi lowo

songs.title: Jesus, Jesus, it is with much pleasure that I praise your name
Oruko to gbamila o, to mu nu mi dun (Busola oke)
Gbogbo aiye e e, gbe Jesu ga (Hymn)
You are the pillar that holds my life, Master Jesus
Gbogbo aiye n wariri, ni oruko re won k'orin B'eti to bi to ooo, Jeeeesu
At it the center of it all, it's you that I see (Eben)
Arewa to ju arewa lo, Olola to ju olola lo, Ni Jesu Baba mi agba
Iba re Jesu, Iba re o Baba, Ajuba re o, Omo OLORUN
Jesu yi o *2, Iwo l'ologo didan,...mimo,...julo
That wonderful name, Jesus (*3), There is no other name I know
Ko s'oruko to dabi ti Jesu, Ko s'oruko to dabi ti Baba
No one like you, Jesus...You are the God of everything, no one like you
Jesu ooo, Jesu (*2), OLORUKO APERIRE Jesuuoooo
O ya ninu ogo (*3)
O tin sise re bo, Baba se lasepe
Owo oluwa, ton sise agbara, Iyanu loro re, To yi aiye mi pada
Who has the final say? Jehovah has the final say
Yahweh, your name is Yahweh. You are the miracle working God
Oh my God, carry me dey go
Only you can do, what no man can do (Ada Ehi)
Let your power flow in this place, let your healing come in this place
Hail my Jesus, Ebube, Ebube, Ebubedike
Efi iyin fun OLUWA, nitori ti O seun, nitori t'anu re duro lai lai
MO da ope pada sodo eni to lope
Alaiye, yin OLUWA o, fun ore re ati ise Iyanu re
Darling Jesus, darling Jesus, oh my darling Jesus you're a wonderful Lord
Alaiye lo ma yin o o, oku ko Le yin o
songs.lyrics: Alaiye lo ma yin o o, oku ko Le yin o (Alaye)

songs.title: Oke nla nla, oke wewe, iji lile ko Le duro niwaju re
We call Him EBUBEDIKE, Jehovah Jireh EBUBEDIKE
My God is a good God...Yes He is
You are God from beginning to the end, there's no place for argument
This kind God, another one no dey o
When you see me dance, I dance like a winner man o
Ase aye ope yo, o yo...O ti pada yo
A a a e, this kind God, another one no dey o
Ko ma wo bi mo ti wuwa, ko wo bi motinse...o san toju mi lojojumo
Oyibiribiri o yi kan mi o
My Daddy My Daddy, your baby is singing
OLORUN, to da awon, oke igbani, eyin ni mo fi ope mi fun
You have done so much for me, I cannot tell it all
Carry me dey go, anywhere better dey
Oba ton Dari afefe, Dari ayo mi sibi ti mo wa o
OLORUN to tobi, OLORUN baba agba. Aiye o GBA o o, O f'orun se bugbe
Anu re lon soro, Baba, agbara mi mako o o, Iwo ni
Ase o Baba, Ase o Jesu...Kini nba fi san ore re, bi o ti poto laye mi
Kini nba fun o Oluwa? To j'ope lo, E mi o mo
I will never be ungrateful to you Lord
OLORUN Babalola, emi maan r'ise owo re,
ENU mi ti ko ko okele, Ara mi ti ko ko aso....emi o yin o o Baba
Jesu ja seke seke mi...o ku o somi d'alaye
You are good and your mercies forever, Halleluyah
Halleluyah, ni o ma ko, Halleluyah si Iwo OLORUN mi (Tope Alabi)
Oshey to o doju adura timi (*2), Gba to ti ni kin ma ma ja'we
Ore ti baba se o jomi loju, Ore ti baba se o ya mi l'enu
Mo wo bi mo ti bere, mo wo bi ti mode...Gbogbo ogo lo ye o o
You are Yahweh eee, you are Yahweh
Eni ti o ni jen dupe se
OLUWA (*2), emi naa dupe lowo re
Ega ega Baba ooo E ga E ga
Jehovah reigns, Jehovah reigns...You are lifted up, above other gods
Watimagbo watimagbo p'Oluwa dara simi o...Da da da da da da, Oluwa dara simi o
songs.lyrics: Da da da da da da, Oluwa dara simi ooo

songs.title: Oba ton'gba dobale Oba, emi se Kabiyesi re
Mo r'owo re l'aye mi, Mo r'ise re  l'aye mi
Eyin ni a WA gbega Eyin ni a WA fiyin fun
songs.lyrics:
Eyin ni a WA gbega
Eyin ni a WA fiyin fun
OLORUN WA ton gbe ibi giga, 
Eyin ni a WA gbega

songs.title: Kabiyesi re OLUWA, Oba to fimole s'aso bora
Iyin re Baba, Iyin re Omo, Iyin re Emi mimo, Iyin re o
Iyin re o ni tan lenu mi o...Ore Oluwa lori mi ko fi igba kan duro
A m'ore, OLUWA a m'ore...Owo wa loke a gbe o ga, a m'ore
Baba Baba, Baba agba o, Baba Baba Baba agba, ko ma s'elomiran
E ba mi ki Baba ku ise, Baba, Baba, Baba ku ise iyanu
Modupe mori Anu gba (*3), LOWO apata aiyeraiye
Iwo lo pen WA, Baba mode o, aiye mi dowo re, ba mi tunse
Iwo loye, Ogo ola, Iwo loye, Iyin Eye (Sola Allyson)
Ki lan f'Oba pe...Oba o Oba Alase Oba
Eru re n ba mi..Oba to f'idi aiye so'le
E ma ba mi gbe Jesu yi ga...ehn a ehn
Abiyamo gboja gboro gboro ni Jesu
Oba to gaju (*3), l'Oba wa...Emmanueli (*3) l'Oba wa....Gbogbo alaiye (*3)....
Eni ba more Oluwa o, ko tu keke ijo sile oya o (KWAM-1)
OLORUN mi ooo, Baba ase  (KWAM-1)
Lododo daju daju...Anu re yo si wa titi aiye
Ajahurakabi...Oba mi de ooo, Olori aye o
Aseun o Baba, Ase o Jesu...Kinibafisan ore re bi o ti po to
OLORUN agbaiye o, you are mighty
OLORUN agbaiye eee, Mo fogo fun o o, Iwo lOba Aseda (Tope Alabi)
Ope la o ma da (x2)...fun ore re lori aiye awa, ope la o ma da
Oba Ara...to wo so Ara...olori aiye, to faso Ara bora
Enu mi o, enu mi o...Enu mi o ma korin halleluyah sOba Aiyeraiye
Afuyegege ti ko se gbe, jigbini jigbini bi ate ikele (Sola Allyson)
Aye ope yo, bi ile aiye ti le lekoko...O pada jasi ire, o pada ja sayo
I can carry my body...Emi MIMO ase
Oba ton sore fun ni lai wo be, Mo wa yin o o Baba
Oloore, Alaanu, Alatileyin mi, Oloore
Titi lae lae lope mi lodo re
Anu Ma lon soro Baba, agbara wa ma ko, Iwo ni
Eyin ni OLUWA Jehovah, Eyin ni OLUWA Oba wa
Bosenja fun mi, mi o mo, iranwo re sa ni mon ri
Mo more, OLUWA mo more, owo mi loke mo gbe o ga
Emi o yin o Baba...Niwon igba ti mo ba wa laye
Angeli yin i, Mimo Mimo, Kerubu gbega, gbega
E ba mi kii, E ba mi ki...Eni agba ojo
Yin yin yin Oluwa o, yin OLORUN agbaye o e yin Baba
Yin logo Alade wura, Yin logo Oba ti a kan mogi
Oba tOla re n mi legbe legbe
Emi ni, Oba tin je Emi ni, Iwo loni ka ma beru, Emi ni
Koselomiran afi Iwo, koselomiran, afi Iwo
Kabiyesi kabiyesi re, Baba agba
Eyin loye (x3), lati gba ogo (You are worthy *3, to be glorified)
Sara re, osuba re...Aiyeraiye aseda orun sara re re e o
What a marvelous God (x2), He has done marvelous things for me
I thank you Lord (x2), I thank you, Jehovah Almighty
Angels are singing, You are worthy oh Lord!
Who is greater than Jehovah Lord divine?
Verily verily you are good, Jesus you are good
Ta lo dabiire? (x2)...Ninu gbogbo Alagbara laiye
Oku to ti ku, ko le yin o Jesu, Tori o mu mi wa, mo wa yin o o Baba
(Emi Emi Emi, Emi o yin o o Baba) x2...Ore re po Baba
E fi ope fun Oluwa awon Oluwa, to ri anu re duro titi lai lai
Kare Ba mi, kare Ba mi o, kare ba mi, Eku ise o
Ase Ase O...Aseun Oluwa wa, Aseun Oluwa wa
Arugbo ojo awa juba re (x3), Eyin le wa lehin wa tawa fin sogo.
Binu re ba dun ko ba mi gbe Jesu ga o, gbe ga
E ba mi yin Oluwa halleluyah, Eni ba more Jesu ko ba mi gbega
E ka mi ye Loni o, modupe Baba..modupe Omo..modupe Emi mimo
Eru re nbami...Oba to fidi aiye sole o
(Sun mi si iwaju, majen dero ehin) x2, Baba to se Josefu logo sun mi si iwaju
Iyin ye OLORUN wa, Oba ton gbo adura
Eyin ni o, Olorun o, Eledumare, Oga Ogo
Olorun to lagbara, Osuba re mare o, eeee, eee, Osuba re ma re o e
Olorun dada l'Olorun mi (x2), o se mi dada, o wuwa dada
Who is like unto thee, oh Lord
(Emi naa re Oluwa) x2...Emi erupe lasan
(Emi naa re Oluwa) x2....Mo wa dupe ore asodun modun
You are the reason why we are singing, Jehovah (Laisi Eyin, ko le si Awa)
songs.lyrics:
You are the reason why we are singing, Jehovah
Laisi Eyin, ko le si Awa, Jehovah

songs.title: Ta lo to o? Ta lo ju o lo? Laiye lorun kosi o
Eru Olorun bami, Eru OLORUN bami o
Heavenly Lord, Your name is wonderful, your name is excellent
Ibi e simi de, me ma mo pe mo le debe, mo yin o logo o
You are the God of Heaven the most Powerful
I will praise you from Everlasting, everlasting to everlasting
Ijinle ninu ijinle, aseun o...ano wa soro, ase
Didara ni ife, didara labo (Tope Alabi)
Osuba re re o (x2), Oba ta o ri, tan rise owo re
Yes you are the Lord, Most High
There is nothing you cannot do, Jehovah Olugbeja wa
Glorious God, Beautiful King, Excellent God, we bow before your throne
Baba mo mope mi wa (x2), ore re ma po lori aye wa
Baba I praise your name, you are worthy of praise
E Yahweh, e Yahweh kun nma nma
Mimo Loluwa, Angeli won mi ke o (Tope Alabi)
In Jesus Name, I pray, I pray, In Jesus Name, Amen Amen
Jesu (x4), Arugbo ojo...Awimayehun...Jesu Jesu...Jesu Jesu, Oba
Eeee my Lord is good ooo, Eeee my Lord is good ooo
No be say I dey craze, Na God I dey I dey praise o
OLUWA ase, fun ore re, oluwa ase fun anu re
Sibe Oluwa dara, bo ti le wun Kori o
Yahweh, covenant keeping God
Glory be to God in the highest amen
Reliable, Reliable God,  You are Jehovah
We will praise from everlasting
OLORUN MI, OLORUN MI, Iwo loju ti mo fin riran
Orun on aiye, kun fun ogo re, Egbegberun awon irawo (Tope Alabi)
We are grateful, oh Lord, for all you have done for us
Thanks, thanks, we give you thanks
There is something that makes me coming to your presence
Iwo l'Oba o, Iwo l'Oba, OLORUN agbaiye, Iwo l'Oba
O ti SE o, Baba ti SE o, ohun ton ba wa leru, Baba ti SE o
He has done for me...What my father cannot do
songs.lyrics: ...What my mother cannot do, He has done for me

songs.title: Alasepe l'olorun mi, kii sise re labo (Ayefele)
Everybody looku looku see what the Lord has done
Gbogbo agbara Jesu lowo re lowa
You are marvelous eee
Orisun iye, Oba Alase, Jesu mo be o o (KSA)
A a, e e, oro mi jasi Iyanu (x3), o ja si Iyanu, OLUWASEUN
Onise Iyanu, you are the God of awesome wonders (Nat. Bassey)
Toto ola re, toto ola re, Oba to so okun d'iyangbe ile, toto
All other gods, they are the works of men, You are the only God, there is none like you
Eyin oba ogo ogo, Oun ni olorun...Ise re yoo ma yin..fibukun fun oluwa okan mi
Oh be lifted, above other God's, we lay our crowns, and worship you
I will not be silent, I will always worship you...As long as I am breathing
I'll put you in front, in front of my melody, You are all that matters
OLORUN to Tobi, OLORUN Baba agba
I will lift up my voice, I will joyfully sing
We really want to..thank you Jesus (*3), Awa ma dupe ore ano, ore oni
Ase JESU, Te ife nla da wa si, Opolopo lo ti ku, ti won ti file bora
Gbani gbani o, E ma seee...Alaanu wa ni gbogbo igba
E ki oloore (*3), Oloore
You are the reason why I lift my hands, Why I raise my voice, why I sing to you
Oluwa Oluwa mi, OLORUN OLORUN MI, Olowo Ori mi e ma SEUN, Modupe te ko mi yo
ATI ni leyin ko ju Ma ti ni mo yin o
Modupe Oluwa, pe mo ni o lati Ma saba
Amope WA WA, Oga ogo e gba, Kabiyesi Iwo nikan lope ye
Mo mo ri ri re, torina ni mo sen jo...tewo gba Iyin mi Oba mi oloore
Taleni to wa lehin re, ti mo fin sako, OLORUN lo WA lehin wa...Tori re mo sen sako
OLORUN MI *2, Iwo loju ti mo fin riran, Iwo ni kokoro ti a fin si lekun
Amope WA, a mu Iyin WA o...gbope
Bo sen ja fun mi, mi o mo, Iranwo re sa ni mon ri, Oba ton ja fun mi ni koko
Thank u for fighting my battle for me, Jehovah OLUGBEJA
Ibi mo gba koja, awon kan gba be soda
Oniduro WA e, eseun o
Mi o se ni jo (x2) Oluwa pa mi lerin ayo, Mi o se ni jo
We really want to thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, thank you
Mo ri're, mo ri're, mo ri're gba o
You are great yes you are, Holy One (Steve Crown)
I’m serving the God of miracle, I know, Yes I know
From east to west, no other god, from north to south
We give you glory Lord, as we honour you
Emi awon Wolii, ipa re ga pupo, Emi awon Wolii, agbara re ga pupo
